extractions.problem: Whole cell model with codon resolution for mRNA translation is lacking
extractions.method: Single-cell translation elongation model operating at cell, mRNA and codon levels
extractions.finding: High correlations between simulated and empirical values

extractions.problem: Cardiac pump function modeling requires multiscale electromechanics framework
extractions.finding: Simulated pressure-volume loops for cardiac chambers

extractions.problem: In vivo crowding effects on biological macromolecule structure and dynamics
extractions.method: All-atom molecular dynamics of atomistic cytoplasmic models
extractions.finding: Studied protein and nucleic acid behavior in crowded cytoplasm

extractions.problem: NSCLC management cost estimation across disease stages
extractions.method: Whole-disease model of NSCLC diagnostic and therapeutic actions
extractions.finding: Mean expected cost per NSCLC patient estimated

extractions.problem: PD-L1 role in neuroblastoma resistance to immunity
extractions.method: Mouse model with whole cell vaccine and checkpoint inhibition
extractions.finding: Immunogenic neuroblastoma acquires adaptive immune resistance via PD-L1

extractions.problem: Neural induction and differentiation from human embryonic stem cells
extractions.method: hESC neural differentiation with defined protocols
extractions.finding: Generated functional neural derivatives from hESCs

extractions.problem: Breast cancer treatment requires patient-specific drug sensitivity profiling
extractions.method: Ex vivo whole tumor cell culture for drug sensitivity testing
extractions.finding: Established breast cancer whole tumor cell culture system

extractions.problem: Q-VAX whole cell vaccine causes reactogenic responses requiring improvement
extractions.method: Evaluation of vaccine reactogenicity in sensitized animal models
extractions.finding: Sensitized mice produce local reactogenic responses to whole cell vaccine

extractions.problem: Quantifying mHA variation impact on GVHD in stem cell transplant
extractions.method: Whole exome sequencing of donor-recipient pairs
extractions.finding: Analyzed exome sequencing data for 78 donor-recipient pairs

extractions.problem: Multiscale modeling of cardiac excitation-contraction coupling
extractions.method: Fully coupled spatially-detailed simulation tool for cardiac ECC
extractions.finding: Developed fully coupled simulation tool for cardiac modeling
